parameters.query:
SELECT 'encours' as data_type, e.* FROM encours e
UNION ALL
SELECT 'rendezvous' as data_type, r.praticien, r.mois, r.nb_rdv, r.duree_totale_rdv, r.nb_patients, r.nb_nouveaux_patients FROM rendezvous r
UNION ALL
SELECT 'realisation' as data_type, re.praticien, re.mois, re.nb_patients, re.montant_facture, re.montant_encaisse FROM realisation re
UNION ALL
SELECT 'joursouvert' as data_type, j.praticien, j.mois, j.nb_heures FROM joursouvert j
